text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 122 

IHS_SRVC_IND 

LABEL: Indian Health Service (IHS) Service Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: A code to indicate services received by Medicaid-eligible individuals who are American Indian or 
Alaska Native (AI/AN) through facilities of the IHS, whether operated by IHS or by Tribes. 

SHORT NAME: IHS_SRVC_IND 

LONG NAME: IHS_SRVC_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File
